api_secret.description: AppFollow API token, sent as the X-AppFollow-API-Token header. Never logged.

base_url.description: AppFollow API base URL override for tests or proxies.

app_collection_ids.description: Comma-separated list of AppFollow app collection ids to fan out over for the app_lists stream (one GET /account/apps/app request per id, forwarded as apps_id). Required for app_lists; legacy's auto-discovery fallback (listing /account/apps when unset) is not modeled here — see docs.md Known limits.

ext_ids.description: Comma-separated list of AppFollow app external ids (ext_id) to fan out over for the ratings/reviews/reviews_summary/keywords/rankings/versions/versions_whatsnew/ratings_history streams (one request per id, forwarded as ext_id). Required for all of those streams.

report_from.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD) for the reviews and reviews_summary streams' required from/to date-range filter.

report_to.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD) for the reviews and reviews_summary streams' required from/to date-range filter.

report_country.description: Two-letter store country code for the versions stream's required country filter.

report_store.description: Store code (itunes/google_play) for the ratings_history stream's required store filter.
